mapper.select: SELECT a.baemin_ad_id, a.upload_id, a.year_month, a.ad_fee FROM baemin_ad a JOIN upload u ON a.upload_id = u.upload_id WHERE u.store_id = #{storeId} AND a.year_month = TRUNC(#{yearMonth}, 'MM')
mapper.insert:
SELECT baemin_ad_seq.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO baemin_ad (baemin_ad_id, upload_id, year_month, ad_fee) VALUES (#{baeminAdId}, #{uploadId}, #{yearMonth}, #{adFee})
